name: /EODATA/CLMS/land_cover_use_in_priority_areas/urban_atlas/clms_ua_building-height _europe_10m_3yearly_v1/2021
browserSearchPath: CLMS Land Cover & Use in Priority Areas/Urban Atlas/Building Height
collectionDescription: Urban Atlas Building Block Height 2021 is a 10 m high resolution raster layer containing height information generated for selected cities and urban areas as part of the Urban atlas suite of products. Height information is based on satellite information and derived datasets like the digital surface model, the digital terrain model and the normalized digital surface model (DSM).

layers.longDescription: Provides height information in the spatial resolution of 10 m for core urban areas in selected cities across Europe for the 2021 reference year. The dataset is available as raster data.
